summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Human Resources professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing people programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be applying systems thinking to improve people experience—through human-centered approaches.

bullets.text: Shared proactive insights from {data|people data}, analyzing 2,000+ employee experiences to uncover hot spots and guide C-suite retention decisions
Led a {prog|manager effectiveness} initiative, coaching leaders with reports that improved team performance and engagement
Supported {prog|performance review} and calibration through consultations on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and evaluation processes
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Delivered strategic HR solutions for business priorities across {ex|employee relations}, headcount, and succession planning
Directed a Mergers & Acquisitions project supporting {coord|org design} and change management across global stakeholders
Coached senior leaders via an Inclusive Leadership workshop, later scaled to 23 global locations
Optimized onboarding processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying responsibilities
Build deep partnerships with {cross|leaders} across Product, Tech, and Sales, serving as a conduit between stakeholders and the broader team
Apply {coord|systems thinking} to translate patterns and friction into improvements across people programs and operating rhythms
Coach managers through change, refining programs for 70+ staff and reducing onboarding time by 75% via {tools|AI tools} and feedback loops
Facilitate listening sessions with 25 global {cross|stakeholders} to surface themes, resulting in 3 new programs best aligned with needs
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to {prog|performance management}
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
